---
title: "Chikv | Cellchat analysis"
author: "Giorgio Gonnella"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: sandstone
params:
  analysis: "1"
  input_step: "03.P.integration"
  input_rds: "integrated_so.rds"
  this_step: "07.P.compute_cellchat"
  output_rds: "so_w_cellchat.rds"
  resume_rds: ""   # if non-empty, skip group CellChat and load this RDS instead
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message=F, warning=F, echo=F)
withr::with_dir(here::here(), { source("renv/activate.R") })

library(Seurat)
library(CellChat)
library(future)

options(future.globals.maxSize = 10 * 1024^3)

analysis_root <- here::here(paste0("analysis-", params$analysis,"/"))

input_step_dir <- paste0(analysis_root, "steps/", params$input_step, "/")
input_var_dir <- paste0(input_step_dir, "results/vars/")

if (!dir.exists(input_var_dir)) {
  stop("Input variable directory does not exist: ", input_var_dir)
}

this_step_dir <- paste0(analysis_root, "steps/", params$this_step, "/")
if (!dir.exists(this_step_dir)) {
  stop("Current step directory does not exist: ", this_step_dir)
}

var_dir <- paste0(this_step_dir, "results/vars/")
if (!dir.exists(var_dir)) {
  dir.create(var_dir, recursive = TRUE)
}
```

```{r load, echo=F}
if (nchar(params$resume_rds) > 0) {
  so <- readRDS(file = params$resume_rds)
} else {
  so <- readRDS(file = paste0(input_var_dir, params$input_rds))
}
Idents(so) <- "celltype.abbrev"
resuming <- nchar(params$resume_rds) > 0
```

# Cell proportions permutations test

Perform a permutation test to assess the differences in cell type proportions.

```{r subset_so_by_timepoint, echo=TRUE}
if (!resuming) {
  so_A <- subset(so, TimePoint == "A")
  so_6m <- subset(so, TimePoint == "6m")
  so_A_NC <- subset(so_A, clinical_condition == "Non-Chronic")
  so_6m_NC <- subset(so_6m, clinical_condition == "Non-Chronic")
  so_A_C <- subset(so_A, clinical_condition == "Chronic")
  so_6m_C <- subset(so_6m, clinical_condition == "Chronic")
}
```

```{r init_misc}
if (!resuming) so@misc$cellchat <- list()
```

```{r cellchat_function}
run_cellchat <- function(so, group.by, ncores = NULL) {
  if (is.null(ncores)) {
    ncores <- max(1, min(8, future::availableCores() - 1))
  }
  cellchat <- createCellChat(object = GetAssayData(so, assay = "RNA",
                                                   slot = "data"),
                             meta   = so@meta.data,
                             group.by = group.by)
  cellchat@DB <- CellChatDB.human
  cellchat <- subsetData(cellchat)

  plan("multisession", workers = ncores)
  cellchat <- identifyOverExpressedGenes(cellchat)
  cellchat <- identifyOverExpressedInteractions(cellchat)
  cellchat <- smoothData(cellchat, adj = PPI.human)

  cellchat <- computeCommunProb(cellchat,
                                raw.use         = TRUE,
                                population.size = TRUE)
  cellchat <- filterCommunication(cellchat, min.cells = 10)
  cellchat <- computeCommunProbPathway(cellchat)
  cellchat <- aggregateNet(cellchat)
  cellchat <- netAnalysis_computeCentrality(cellchat, slot.name = "netP")

  plan("sequential")
  return(cellchat)
}
```

## Acute

```{r A_NC_cellchat, echo=TRUE}
if (!resuming) so@misc$cellchat["A_NC"] <- run_cellchat(so_A_NC, group.by = "celltype.abbrev")
```

## 6 months

```{r m6_NC_cellchat, echo=TRUE}
if (!resuming) so@misc$cellchat["6m_NC"] <- run_cellchat(so_6m_NC, group.by = "celltype.abbrev")
```

## Non-Chronic

```{r A_C_cellchat, echo=TRUE}
if (!resuming) so@misc$cellchat["A_C"] <- run_cellchat(so_A_C, group.by = "celltype.abbrev")
```

## Chronic

```{r m6_C_cellchat, echo=TRUE}
if (!resuming) so@misc$cellchat["6m_C"] <- run_cellchat(so_6m_C, group.by = "celltype.abbrev")
```

## Per-sample CellChat objects (for rankNet statistical testing)

```{r per_sample_cellchat, echo=TRUE}
so@misc$cellchat_per_sample <- list()
groups <- list(
  A_NC  = list(tp = "A",  cc = "Non-Chronic"),
  A_C   = list(tp = "A",  cc = "Chronic"),
  `6m_NC` = list(tp = "6m", cc = "Non-Chronic"),
  `6m_C`  = list(tp = "6m", cc = "Chronic")
)
for (grp_name in names(groups)) {
  g   <- groups[[grp_name]]
  sub <- so[, so$TimePoint == g$tp & so$clinical_condition == g$cc]
  samples <- sort(unique(sub$sample))
  so@misc$cellchat_per_sample[[grp_name]] <- list()
  for (s in samples) {
    sub_s <- sub[, sub$sample == s]
    # Drop unused factor levels (required by computeCommunProb)
    sub_s$celltype.abbrev <- droplevels(sub_s$celltype.abbrev)
    Idents(sub_s) <- "celltype.abbrev"
    # Skip samples where no cell type has >= 10 cells
    ct_counts <- table(sub_s$celltype.abbrev)
    if (any(ct_counts >= 10)) {
      so@misc$cellchat_per_sample[[grp_name]][[s]] <-
        run_cellchat(sub_s, group.by = "celltype.abbrev")
    }
  }
}
```

## Derived CellChat objects (all visualizations read from these)

```{r derived_setup}
# pair_map: defines which two conditions are compared per pair
pair_map <- list(
  A_C_vs_NC    = c("A_NC",  "A_C"),
  `6m_C_vs_NC` = c("6m_NC", "6m_C"),
  NC_A_vs_6m   = c("A_NC",  "6m_NC"),
  C_A_vs_6m    = c("A_C",   "6m_C")
)

cond_names <- c("A_NC", "A_C", "6m_NC", "6m_C")

# Cell-type grouping vector (27 cell types -> 9 groups)
group.celltype <- c(
  rep("B cells",          5),
  rep("CD4+ T cells",     8),
  rep("CD8+ T cells",     4),
  rep("GD T cells",       2),
  rep("MAIT cells",       1),
  rep("NK cells",         1),
  rep("Dendritic cells",  2),
  rep("Monocytes",        3),
  rep("Progenitor cells", 1)
)

# --- Filtering helpers ---
rebuild_net <- function(cc, mask) {
  cc@net$count  <- apply(mask, c(1, 2), sum)
  prob_masked   <- cc@net$prob; prob_masked[!mask] <- 0
  cc@net$weight <- apply(prob_masked, c(1, 2), sum)
  lr_names <- dimnames(cc@net$pval)[[3]]
  pw_map   <- cc@LR$LRsig[lr_names, "pathway_name"]
  all_pw   <- cc@netP$pathways
  prob_pw  <- array(0, dim = dim(cc@netP$prob), dimnames = dimnames(cc@netP$prob))
  for (pw in all_pw) {
    idx <- which(pw_map == pw)
    if (length(idx) == 1)     prob_pw[, , pw] <- prob_masked[, , idx]
    else if (length(idx) > 1) prob_pw[, , pw] <- apply(prob_masked[, , idx], c(1, 2), sum)
  }
  cc@netP$prob     <- prob_pw
  cc@netP$pathways <- all_pw[apply(prob_pw > 0, 3, any)]
  cc <- netAnalysis_computeCentrality(cc, slot.name = "netP")
  cc
}
unfilter_cc <- function(cc) rebuild_net(cc, cc@net$prob > 0)
filter_cc_by_pval <- function(cc, thr = 0.05) {
  # Require prob > 0 AND pval <= thr (pval=0 for zero-prob interactions)
  mask <- cc@net$pval <= thr & cc@net$prob > 0
  mask[is.na(mask)] <- FALSE
  rebuild_net(cc, mask)
}

merge_two <- function(cc1, cc2, nms) {
  mergeCellChat(setNames(list(cc1, cc2), nms), add.names = nms)
}

mergeInteractions_inplace <- function(cc_in, grp) {
  cc_g <- mergeInteractions(cc_in, grp)
  cc_g@net$count  <- cc_g@net$count.merged
  cc_g@net$weight <- cc_g@net$weight.merged
  cc_g@net$count.merged  <- NULL
  cc_g@net$weight.merged <- NULL
  cc_g@idents <- factor(grp[as.integer(cc_in@idents)], levels = unique(grp))
  cc_g
}
```

```{r derived_per_condition}
# cc$all / cc$pfilt — filtered per-condition objects
so@misc$cc <- list(all = list(), pfilt = list())
for (nm in cond_names) {
  so@misc$cc$all[[nm]]   <- unfilter_cc(so@misc$cellchat[[nm]])
  so@misc$cc$pfilt[[nm]] <- filter_cc_by_pval(so@misc$cellchat[[nm]])
}
```

```{r derived_merged_pairs}
# cc_merged$all / cc_merged$pfilt — merged pairs for comparison plots
so@misc$cc_merged <- list(all = list(), pfilt = list())
for (pair in names(pair_map)) {
  nms <- pair_map[[pair]]
  for (sfx in c("all", "pfilt")) {
    so@misc$cc_merged[[sfx]][[pair]] <-
      merge_two(so@misc$cc[[sfx]][[nms[1]]],
                so@misc$cc[[sfx]][[nms[2]]], nms)
  }
}
```

```{r derived_ranknet}
# cc_ranknet_merged — per-sample merged objects for rankNet do.stat=TRUE
# Samples are subset to the intersection of cell types so that all net$prob
# arrays have the same dimensions, which rankNet(do.stat=TRUE) requires.
so@misc$cc_ranknet_merged <- list()
for (pair in names(pair_map)) {
  nms <- pair_map[[pair]]
  ps1 <- so@misc$cellchat_per_sample[[nms[1]]]
  ps2 <- so@misc$cellchat_per_sample[[nms[2]]]
  if (length(ps1) > 0 && length(ps2) > 0) {
    all_ps   <- c(ps1, ps2)
    ps_names <- c(names(ps1), names(ps2))
    common_idents <- Reduce(intersect, lapply(all_ps, function(cc) levels(cc@idents)))
    all_ps_sub <- lapply(all_ps, function(cc)
      subsetCellChat(cc, idents.use = common_idents))
    so@misc$cc_ranknet_merged[[pair]] <-
      mergeCellChat(all_ps_sub, add.names = ps_names, cell.prefix = TRUE)
  }
}
```

```{r derived_grouped}
# cc_grouped$all / cc_grouped$pfilt — cell-type-grouped per-condition objects
so@misc$cc_grouped <- list(all = list(), pfilt = list())
for (nm in cond_names) {
  for (sfx in c("all", "pfilt")) {
    so@misc$cc_grouped[[sfx]][[nm]] <-
      mergeInteractions_inplace(so@misc$cc[[sfx]][[nm]], group.celltype)
  }
}
```

```{r derived_grouped_merged}
# cc_grouped_merged$all / cc_grouped_merged$pfilt — grouped merged pairs
so@misc$cc_grouped_merged <- list(all = list(), pfilt = list())
for (pair in names(pair_map)) {
  nms <- pair_map[[pair]]
  for (sfx in c("all", "pfilt")) {
    so@misc$cc_grouped_merged[[sfx]][[pair]] <-
      merge_two(so@misc$cc_grouped[[sfx]][[nms[1]]],
                so@misc$cc_grouped[[sfx]][[nms[2]]], nms)
  }
}
```

## Saving data

```{r save, echo=TRUE}
saveRDS(so, paste0(var_dir, params$output_rds))
```

## Session info

```{r, echo=F}
sessionInfo()
```
